series.curator_notes: Classic German children's Hörspiel series by Paul Maar. Episodes 5 and 7 appear to be missing from Spotify. The series uses numbered episodes (Folge 1-12). Some episodes have been re-recorded over the years; the 2015-2024 versions are preferred for audio quality. Albums from Paul Maar artist page are duplicates of the main 'Das Sams' artist and have been excluded as duplicates.
